zh.lifeSummary: 當Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu於1285年出生在法國時，她的父親Renaud II Dargies25歲，母親Agnès de Bruyères11歲。她於1316年與Hugues de Chatillon結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu于1285年出生在法国时，她的父亲Renaud II Dargies25岁，母亲Agnès de Bruyères11岁。她于1316年与Hugues de Chatillon结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: d'Argies
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Angus): habitational name from a place called Dargie, in Liff-Benvie parish (Angus).

nameMeanings.name: Jeanne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu was born in 1285, in France, her father, Renaud II Dargies, was 25 and her mother, Agnès de Bruyères, was 11. She married Hugues de Chatillon in 1316. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu est née en 1285, à France, son père, Renaud II Dargies, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Agnès de Bruyères, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Hugues de Chatillon en 1316. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu 1285 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud II Dargies 25 und ihre Mutter Agnès de Bruyères 11. Sie hat 1316 Hugues de Chatillon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu è nata il nel 1285 nel Francia, sua padre, Renaud II Dargies, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Agnès de Bruyères, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Hugues de Chatillon nel 1316. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheuが1285年にフランスで生まれた時，父Renaud II Dargiesは25歳，母Agnès de Bruyèresは11歳であった。1316年にHugues de Chatillonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu(이)가 1285년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud II Dargies(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès de Bruyères(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 1316년 Hugues de Chatillon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu nasceu em 1285, em França, seu pai, Renaud II Dargies, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de Bruyères, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugues de Chatillon em 1316. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu родилась в 1285 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud II Dargies было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès de Bruyères, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugues de Chatillon в 1316 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jeanne d'Argies Dame de Catheu nació en 1285, en Francia, su papá, Renaud II Dargies, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Agnès de Bruyères, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Hugues de Chatillon en 1316. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
